description: (a) Draft of a dirge for a noble woman. (b) List of names ending with "the tailor and his travel companion." Including: Yosef b. Shemuel, Shelomo b. Yosef, Yehuda b. Pinḥas, Yefet ha-Bavli, Aharon b. Moshe, Shemuel b. Zuṭa, Yeshuʿa b. Saʿdān b. Yehuda, Sulaymān b. Zakkār, Yehuda b. Ṣedaqa, Shemuel b. Moshe, Avraham b. Menaḥem, Shemuel b. Yaʿaqov, Sahlān b. Salmān, Nissin Yosef, Hillel, Ḥātim, Yiṣḥaq, Khalaf, Saʿīd, Manṣūr, Faraj, Muʿammar, Moshe al-Khayyāt and his travel companion (rafīq), Yeshuʿa b. [...], Manṣūr, Netanʾel b. Shabbat, Sameaḥ, Ghallāb/Jallāb(?), Ghālib, Yosef b. [...], Yaʿaqov [...].
description_he: (א) טיוטת קינה לאישה נכבדת; (ב) רשימת שמות המסתיימת ב'החייט ובן-לוויתו'
